---
title: "My first website"
author: "Bárbara"
affiliation: "Universidade do Minho"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem    
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
    self-contained: true
    lang: en
    bibliography: biblio.bib
    citation-location: margin
---

# Presentation
This is Bárbara's website! This could be a normal website with a picture of a turtle (it was before), but I decided to give it a bit of character.

If you're reading this is because you know that Britney was right in 2007 :).

This is a citation for [@ggplot]!

And this is a Britney when she went mad.

![a turtle](img/hawksbill_sea_turtle.jpg){#fig-turtle}

The @fig-turtle is not doing okay.

[Link to something](https://open.spotify.com/track/6I9VzXrHxO9rA9A5euc8Ak?autoplay_ok=1)

## Sub presentation

Why this equation? I don't really know if this even exists.

$$z= \dfrac{1-\mu}{\sigma}$${#eq-myequation}

### Sub sub section

In @eq-myequation , we wrote down an equation.

@eq-ctt shows the basic equation in classic test theory.

:::{.column-margin}

$$X= v+E$${#eq-ctt}
:::
 
#### My paragraph

This is a paragraph.


:::{.grid}

:::{.g-col-4}
This is my first column
:::
:::{.g-col-4}
This is my second column
:::
:::{.g-col-4}
This is my third column
:::

:::
